name: Team Kasich
subject: 🇺🇸 Don't miss this one! 🇺🇸
body:
We have an exclusive offer that we're excited to share with you.
We just got in stock a small quantity of bumper stickers.

Peter, we have an exclusive
offer that we're excited to share with you.

We just got in stock a small
quantity of bumper stickers to support Gov. Kasich's message
about standing up to protect the honor of our country by
rejecting candidates who are not worthy of the office they seek,
as we saw recently in Alabama.

Chip in $25 or more before December 23rd (one week away!) and
we'll mail you one of our limited-edition stickers!

The funds we raise go directly
into spreading our message about working together to find
common-sense solutions to America's greatest challenges and to
support honorable GOP candidates.

Don't miss your chance to receive
one of these limited-edition stickers before they're gone!

Thank you for all that you're
doing to help.

-Team Kasich

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/iW6PcJcopN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/oW6PcJcopN

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-48506909839-echo3-C34E8B2ABB241EFA8DEF091ED0E42336@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: A note from my wife
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body: Friend, Your support of our movement has been unwavering and I am so proud of all we have accomplished together. That’s why I wanted to be sure you saw you had been selected to receive a special commemorative gift. To claim your special gift, a limited-edition 2018 Official Republican National Committee calendar with photos hand-selected by our INCREDIBLE First Lady, please consider making a contribution below: http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4479f9d59a6ca1f388ba49b7db9d414d81bf661d1a746081d3182f2db9b88b9f4ef53d24b412b080b769a2a283c11c06faccb5025e7459e0 CONTRIBUTE $15 I’m working every day against the Fake News Media, obstructionist liberals, and the elite left to get things done for YOU and our GREAT country, and it is only with true conservative patriots elected across the nation in 2018 can we continue to get things done. http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4479f9d59a6ca1f388ba49b7db9d414d81bf661d1a746081d3182f2db9b88b9f4ef53d24b412b080b769a2a283c11c06faccb5025e7459e0 Please, contribute just $15 to receive your 2018 Official Republican National Committee calendar and pledge your support for another great year together. Thank you, http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4479f9d59a6ca1f388ba49b7db9d414d81bf661d1a746081d3182f2db9b88b9f4ef53d24b412b080b769a2a283c11c06faccb5025e7459e0 Donald J. Trump President of the United States P.S. -- I hope this gift will serve as a reminder on how important the 2018 elections are for the future of our country, Friend, and you’ll display yours with pride. Get yours here: http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4479f9d59a6ca1f388ba49b7db9d414d81bf661d1a746081d3182f2db9b88b9f4ef53d24b412b080b769a2a283c11c06faccb5025e7459e0 http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4479f9d59a6ca1f3c6aecce022ba0d88e0b60e95843ae499b5086786cd46fa17e3af1b2b0ade1c72bd8e6bb896dc5135d43f927180d00e90 http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4479f9d59a6ca1f388ba49b7db9d414d81bf661d1a746081d3182f2db9b88b9f4ef53d24b412b080b769a2a283c11c06faccb5025e7459e0 CONTRIBUTE $15 --------- Forwarded Message --------- From: Melania Trump Date: December 08, 2017 Subject: Have you gotten yours yet? To: http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4479f9d59a6ca1f388ba49b7db9d414d81bf661d1a746081d3182f2db9b88b9f4ef53d24b412b080b769a2a283c11c06faccb5025e7459e0 dpwillis67@gmail.com Dear Friend, You’ve been chosen as one of our top supporters to receive a chance at the first batch of official 2018 Republican National Committee calendars. http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4479f9d59a6ca1f3c6aecce022ba0d88e0b60e95843ae499b5086786cd46fa17e3af1b2b0ade1c72bd8e6bb896dc5135d43f927180d00e90 First, this year’s calendar features photos I have hand-selected, and I hope you will display your calendar throughout the year as a reminder of how important the 2018 elections are to the future of our country. http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4479f9d59a6ca1f388ba49b7db9d414d81bf661d1a746081d3182f2db9b88b9f4ef53d24b412b080b769a2a283c11c06faccb5025e7459e0 Second, I hope you’ll contribute a commemorative gift of $15 to ensure my husband and the Party have the resources needed to keep winning. http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4479f9d59a6ca1f388ba49b7db9d414d81bf661d1a746081d3182f2db9b88b9f4ef53d24b412b080b769a2a283c11c06faccb5025e7459e0 CONTRIBUTE $15 Only with a Congress led by conservative patriots can my husband move forward with his vision to unleash our nation’s full potential. http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4479f9d59a6ca1f388ba49b7db9d414d81bf661d1a746081d3182f2db9b88b9f4ef53d24b412b080b769a2a283c11c06faccb5025e7459e0 This calendar is a small token of appreciation for your consistent support, and I hope you will take this opportunity to contribute $15 today. Thank you, http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4479f9d59a6ca1f388ba49b7db9d414d81bf661d1a746081d3182f2db9b88b9f4ef53d24b412b080b769a2a283c11c06faccb5025e7459e0 Melania Trump First Lady of the United States http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4479f9d59a6ca1f388ba49b7db9d414d81bf661d1a746081d3182f2db9b88b9f4ef53d24b412b080b769a2a283c11c06faccb5025e7459e0 CONTRIBUTE $15 Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4479f9d59a6ca1f338b61d9cef2a7941d7a3f512176f2e8bf6a0e7a42b5f294e5c75e50f12dfb3fa1e4bc28de6d7710c3b1507c44c0887ef www.GOP.com You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we’re glad you’re on our team. It’s because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do! http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4479f9d59a6ca1f3805e73cfa760ecd194a71855a7e9fac61e658fdd2404ff6b4c395dcde469dfb295afaaef86339fb07ee9ee1a3b11d41e Privacy Policy | http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fca3d5bbb495bc017b31264b8985dbf22f3dfb71d59986ef66a1122f482689ce7160e7770a3f42464a67cf711ffd863d85 ">Unsubscribe | http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fccf6ebf77cd5e8ea547e65639e0dc256cde300ee95775924a8f1837cae0f059038eb636e96ac31f1b854a41d2c102c647 Update Profile

name: Team Kasich
subject: The latest
body:
Gov. Kasich was a guest on NBC's Meet the Press this weekend.
Watch the full interview here. Gov. John Kasich was one of the
few voices calling for the Republican Party.

Peter, Gov. Kasich was a guest
on NBC's Meet the Press this weekend. Watch the full interview
here:

Exclusive Offer:

Gov. John Kasich was one of the
few voices calling for the Republican Party to defend America's
honor and ensure that we support candidates that are worthy of
the office they seek.

If you support this message,
please consider chipping in $25 or more right now and we'll send
you a limited-edition sticker:

**This campaign ends on December
23rd, so don't miss your chance!**

If you'd also like to sign our
petition to add your voice to this message, please visit:
JohnKasich.com/CountryOverParty

Upcoming Interview:

Be sure to tune in to Fusion TV
on Tuesday at 10PM ET to watch Gov. Kasich's interview with Jorge
Ramos. Watch a preview here:

Thank you for all that you're
doing to help!

-Team Kasich

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

name: Team DWS
subject: GOP "will gut Medicare and Medicaid"
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| **"Paul Ryan admits the GOP will gut Medicare and Medicaid to pay for tax cuts"**
\-- _ThinkProgress_ , 12/7/2017 We need 15,000 signatures opposing Medicare cuts. Now. [_**< < Make yours one of them >>**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e52/622b7b5b/1820e7d8/307ba3be/604451713/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e171220") The Republican "tax reform" ~~scam~~ plan **could cut Medicare by $25 billion (yes, b-i-l-l-i-o-n) each year.** Now, Speaker Ryan has said Republicans will go after "entitlement reform" in 2018 to bring down the deficit -- a deficit ballooning because of the GOP's massive tax breaks for the wealthy. If that sounds absurd and disgusting to you, you're not alone. And you can do something about it. [_**Demand Speaker Ryan and Republicans in Congress stop attacking Medicare. Add your name.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e52/622b7b5b/1820e7d8/307ba3be/604451713/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e171220") Debbie is standing up for us. Thanks for joining her by signing today. Team DWS |
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e52/622b7b5b/1820e7d8/307ba3b1/604451713/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---
